symptoms.symptom_name: Complete unresponsiveness with agonal gasping breathing

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Defining bystander-observable feature of cardiac arrest.
Suggests a likely acute cardiac/ischaemic precipitant.

symptoms.symptom_name: Absent central pulse, dilated unreactive pupils, complete loss of motor tone

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Definitive clinical confirmation; clinician-only findings sealed from telehealth chat.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Sudden collapse with unresponsiveness, agonal breathing, and preceding chest pain together confirm cardiac arrest requiring immediate CPR/AED.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Immediate hands-only CPR and AED application by bystander
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The only interventions that affect survival before paramedics arrive.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Advanced life support (ALS) by paramedics on arrival, including rhythm analysis and advanced airway/drug therapy
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Definitive next step in the chain of survival.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Waiting for paramedics without starting compressions
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Every minute without CPR/defibrillation substantially reduces survival odds.
